name: state-machine-handler-dict
description: State machine pattern: dict[RunState, handler] with while loop driving until terminal state. Handlers accept Run and return updated Run with new state.

name: async-polling-loop
description: Async polling loop: dispatch ready subtasks, sleep, collect results. Completion signal is collect_result().diff (new commits), secondary is check_status() for dead agents. Test by patching asyncio.sleep to return immediately.

name: dag-dependency-checking
description: DAG dependency checking: deps met when all dep descriptions appear in done_descriptions set (subtask.description for state==done). Subtask description is the dependency identifier.

name: deadlock-detection
description: Deadlock detection: when no subtasks running AND no pending subtasks have deps_met, transition to failed state. Prevents infinite loop when DAG has unsatisfiable dependencies.

name: agent-tracking-map
description: Agent tracking: maintain agent_map dict[subtask_id -> agent_id] to collect results after polling. Required because Subtask only stores agent id string, not AgentSlot object.

name: state-handler-dict-dispatch
description: Orchestrator state machine with dict-based handler dispatch from RunState to async methods

name: execute-poll-dispatch
description: Orchestrator._execute polls for subtask completion, dispatches ready subtasks respecting DAG deps, detects deadlock when no subtasks can dispatch

name: orchestrator-selector-merge-integration
description: Orchestrator integrates AgentSelector and MergeQueue via optional constructor params. _execute uses selector.select() for agent assignment when provided. _merge uses merge_queue.enqueue/process for ordered merging when provided. Falls back to original round-robin/direct-merge behavior when not provided.

name: memory-store-orchestrator-wiring
description: MemoryStore wired as optional param to Orchestrator.__init__(); _learn() called after run completes (not on failure) to store subtask results via memory.store_run_result(run, subtask_results). Errors in _learn() are caught and logged as warnings to avoid disrupting the run result.

name: provenance-stamping
description: Orchestrator._stamp_provenance() populates agent_id, agent_runtime, agent_model, run_id, completed_at on SubtaskResult after collection, using pool._get_slot() for agent details with fallback to agent_id on error

name: per-state-concurrency-limits
description: Orchestrator accepts concurrency_limits: dict[RunState, int] | None param; _execute uses self._concurrency_limits.get(RunState.executing, self._max_agents) for state-specific concurrency control

name: stall-detection-with-retry
description: Track last_activity_at on subtasks, check elapsed time in polling loop, release stalled agents and retry up to max_retries

name: subtask-retry-tracking
description: Add retry_count, max_retries, last_activity_at fields to Subtask model for tracking retry attempts and stall detection

name: id-based-dep-matching
description: Orchestrator._deps_met() matches subtask dependencies by ID instead of description for reliable DAG execution. _resolve_deps() converts planner's description-based deps to IDs using desc->id mapping, keeping unknown deps as-is.

name: cli-project-context-loading
description: CLI _init_components loads CLAUDE.md from repo root and passes as project_context to AgentPool, enabling project-specific conventions in all agent prompts.

name: cognee-orchestrator-wiring
description: CogneeMemory wired as optional param to Orchestrator.__init__(); _learn() calls cognee_memory.ingest_run_result() after memvid with try/except; import guarded by try/except ImportError at module level. SmartPlanner also accepts cognee_memory and calls find_similar_tasks() in decompose() to inject past-run context.

name: retry-deadlock-fix
description: _check_stalls() returns retried+failed count, _execute() decrements active_count to prevent deadlock at concurrency limit
